chapter_title.ar: باب مَا يَجِبُ مِنَ الِاقْتِدَاءِ بِالْأَئِمَّةِ ( عليهم السلام ) فِي التَّعَرُّضِ لِلرِّزْقِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 4 – What is Obligated from the emulating the Imams<sup>asws</sup> regarding the vulnerability of the livelihood

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/21)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/21)
text: دَفَعَ إِلَيَّ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) سَبْعَمِائَةِ دِينَارٍ وَ قَالَ يَا عُذَافِرُ اصْرِفْهَا فِي شَيْ‏ءٍ أَمَّا عَلَى ذَاكَ مَا بِي شَرَهٌ وَ لَكِنْ أَحْبَبْتُ أَنْ يَرَانِيَ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ مُتَعَرِّضاً لِفَوَائِدِهِ
قَالَ عُذَافِرٌ فَرَبِحْتُ فِيهَا مِائَةَ دِينَارٍ فَقُلْتُ لَهُ فِي الطَّوَافِ جُعِلْتُ فِدَاكَ قَدْ رَزَقَ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ فِيهَا مِائَةَ دِينَارٍ فَقَالَ أَثْبِتْهَا فِي رَأْسِ مَالِي .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Muhammad, from Ahmad Bin Abu Abdullah, from Muhammad Bin Ismail, from Muhammad Bin Uzafir, from his father who said,

‘Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> handed over seven hundred Dinars to me and said, ‘O Uzafir! Spend it in something, but upon that is not greed for me<sup>asws</sup>, but I<sup>asws</sup> love it that Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic would See me<sup>asws</sup> striving for its benefits’.

Uzafir said, ‘So I made a gain in it of one hundred Dinars, so I said to him<sup>asws</sup> during the ‘الطَّوَافِ’ circumambulation, ‘May I be sacrificed for you<sup>asws</sup>! Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic has Graced one hundred Dinars in it’. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Corroborate (include) it in the capital of my<sup>asws</sup> wealth’.
en.sarwar: 16. Ali ibn Muhammad has narrated from Ahmad ibn abu ‘Abd Allah from Muhammad ibn ‘Isma’il from Muhammad ibn ‘Adha’fir from his father who has said the following: “Once abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, gave me seven hundred dinars and said, ‘O ‘Adha’fir you can spend it; I do not have any desire for it but I loved that Allah, most Majestic, most Glorious, finds me working for its profits.’ ‘Adha’fir has said, ‘I made one hundred dinar profit with it. During al- Tawaf I said to him, “I pray to Allah to keep my soul in service for your cause, Allah, most Majestic, most Glorious, has granted one hundred dinar profit.’” He (the Imam) said, ‘Add it to my capital money.’”
